note: Regression cases derived from real production incident classes, rewritten with fictional names. Each case: input, context, config overrides, expected enforced text and expected fire guards. Future-dated signal rejection is pinned by unit tests of the recency helper, which applyGuards does not call.

cases.name: unconfirmed-ownership-claim-dropped
cases.input: Northwind Manufacturing secures its workloads with Acme Backup. Contoso Cloud can help you extend that.
cases.expect_text: Contoso Cloud can help you extend that.

cases.name: unconfirmed-claim-whole-text-drop
cases.input: Your team already uses Acme Backup across sites.

cases.name: recipient-name-stripped
cases.input: Hi Jordan, Northwind's expansion caught our eye.
cases.expect_text: Hi, Northwind's expansion caught our eye.

cases.name: placeholder-sentence-dropped
cases.input: Congrats on the Ohio plant. Our [CAPABILITY_1] helps teams like yours.

cases.name: test-identity-noted-not-rewritten
cases.input: Reach out to Sarah Chen for a walkthrough.
cases.expect_text: Reach out to Sarah Chen for a walkthrough.

cases.name: banned-phrase-replaced
cases.input: We will revolutionize your archive costs.
cases.expect_text: We will improve your archive costs.
